name: labhub
description: Claude Code skill for the LabHub research dashboard.

plugins.name: labhub
plugins.description: Log experiment runs to LabHub from chat. Wraps the LabHub REST API; authenticates via GitHub Device Flow.

plugins.name: labhub-flow-ingest
plugins.description: Mirror a research project's progress files into LabHub Flow J view (FlowEvents + task links). Walks <localPath>/progress/<researcher>/progress_*.md, runs LLM extraction, persists rows.

plugins.name: labhub-wiki-ingest
plugins.description: Mirror a research project's progress files into LabHub Wiki entities. LLM-merge upsert: existing entities accumulate well-edited bodies, new entities are auto-created under existing WikiTypes. Pure HTTP via Bearer token.
